---
title: "About me"
toc: false
---

I'm uma-chan, a Data Engineering Manager and MLOps Engineer working on data platforms, developer workflows, and AI-ready tooling.

[Website](https://i9wa4.github.io) | [GitHub](https://github.com/i9wa4) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/daikm) | [X (Twitter)](https://x.com/i9wa4_)

## Start

- [Feed](https://i9wa4.github.io/feed.html)
- [Resume](https://i9wa4.github.io/en/resume/)
